# CWE-515: quota state stored per tenant in DB, not a cross-request covert flag.
lang: go
file: CWE-515-safe.go
---
package sample

import (
	"net/http"

	"github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
	"github.com/jmoiron/sqlx"
)

func SetQuotaSecret(c *gin.Context, db *sqlx.DB) {
	tenant := c.GetString("tenant")
	over := c.PostForm("over") == "1"
	_, _ = db.Exec("UPDATE quotas SET over_limit = ? WHERE tenant = ?", over, tenant)
	c.Status(http.StatusOK)
}

func ProbeQuotaSecret(c *gin.Context, db *sqlx.DB) {
	tenant := c.GetString("tenant")
	var over bool
	_ = db.Get(&over, "SELECT over_limit FROM quotas WHERE tenant = ?", tenant)
	if over {
		c.String(http.StatusOK, "over_limit")
		return
	}
	c.String(http.StatusOK, "ok")
}
